yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Claude_Code_source_leak_exploited_to_spr {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Claude Code source leak exploited to spread malware"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-03"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Cisco_IMC_auth_bypass_vulnerability_allo {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Cisco IMC auth bypass vulnerability allows attackers to alter user passwords (CV"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-03"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-20093" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_TeamPCP_Supply_Chain_Campaign_Update_006 {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 006 - CERT-EU Confirms European Commission"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-03"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-CYB-01" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_The_Good_the_Bad_and_the_Ugly_in_Cyberse {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for The Good, the Bad and the Ugly in Cybersecurity – Week 14"
        severity = "critical"

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 140 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 122 as HIGH risk. 45 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-CYB-01, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
